emails.subject: Christmas Party
emails.body: Christmas Party FYI We are planning on joining Crestone for a combined Denver Christmas party. The cost for our share will be approximately $1,000. I know it is not cheap, but I think it is an important signal and morale booster which is critical at this time. We have a long way to go in this deal.

emails.subject: RE: Christmas Party
emails.body: RE: Christmas Party I think we should still do this, and I may join you guys. BT Dates please. To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: RE: Christmas Party
emails.body: We would love to have you and Kim. Might even be some snow by then. Just let me know if you can make it so they can get a good head count. To: Whitt, Mark

emails.subject: RE: Christmas Party
emails.body: what date is this planned for. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: RE: Christmas Party
emails.body: December 14th. Friday Please join us. To: Whitt, Mark

emails.subject: RE: Christmas Party
emails.body: We are doing a gag gift exchange. Usually it is pretty good, so try and bring something. To: Whitt, Mark
